title: Most Recent Quarterly Refunding Documents
summary: This is a Treasury Department navigation page listing documents released for the 2026 Q1 quarterly refunding cycle. Documents include financing estimates, TBAC (Treasury Borrowing Advisory Committee) reports, auction schedules, and buyback schedules released between January 16 and February 4, 2026. The page itself is an index and does not contain substantive policy content.
key_points: Documents released at 3:00 PM on February 2, 2026: Financing Estimates and Economic Policy Statements for 2026 Q1
Documents released at 8:30 AM on February 4, 2026: TBAC Policy Statement, Report to Secretary, Minutes, Recommended Financing Table, and Treasury presentation for 2026 Q1
Auction Schedule and Buyback Schedule available in XML and PDF formats
Primary Dealer Meeting Agenda released January 16, 2026
Next quarterly refunding documents scheduled for release May 4, 2026 (TBAC) and May 6, 2026 (Auction/Buyback schedules)
Quarterly Release Data next scheduled for April 17, 2026
why_it_matters: This page serves as an entry point to Treasury's quarterly refunding documentation. The actual substantive documents (TBAC reports, financing estimates) would contain relevant information for Treasury market participants. However, this specific page is merely a navigation index without substantive policy or market content.
macro_context: Quarterly refunding documents provide Treasury's financing plans and TBAC recommendations, which inform expectations for Treasury issuance and can impact Treasury market dynamics.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page containing only document release dates and links, no substantive content
Source type is 'listing_page' which violates Rule 5: reject homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, or search_page
No actual TBAC reports, financing estimates, or policy content present - only metadata about when documents were released
Source is too thin to have archival value per Rule 6

notes: This source is a listing/index page for Treasury quarterly refunding documents. It does not contain substantive policy content. The page lists release dates for TBAC reports, financing estimates, auction schedules, and buyback schedules, but the actual documents are not included here. For meaningful market structure or macro catalyst analysis, the individual linked documents (e.g., TBAC Policy Statement, TBAC Minutes, Financing Estimates) would need to be retrieved and archived separately. Source is within 90 days of TODAY and appears current.

reasoning: Listing/navigation page with no substantive content
Contains only document release dates and metadata
Actual policy documents not included in this source
